title: PJTSAU Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Various Research Associate Posts
description: Professor Jayashankar Telangana State Agricultural University (PJTSAU) has announced the offcial notification for the recruitment of various Research Associate Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the M.Sc Ph.D can grab this chance and apply for the PJTSAU Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can attend the walk-in at the given v...
